# Figure S4a: Enrichment of highly variable upregulated pathways in individual and aggregated TB signatures
# last modified: 12/18/25
# author: Kewalin Samart

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(GOSemSim)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(circlize)
library(grid)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
source(here("scripts/00_get_crossSigs_enrichedGO.R"))
```

```{r read in metadata tabel}
summary_df <- read.delim(here("figures/figure2/metadata_annotation/annotation_table.tsv"), sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
```

```{r define indiv file paths}
marray_path_up <- here("data/microarray_pathways/up")
rnaseq_path_up <- here("data/RNAseq_pathways/up")
```

```{r define accessory variables/paths}
pattern <- "allterms_GO_ORA_BGcorrected"
prefix_sub <- "allterms_GO_ORA_BGcorrected"
suffix_sub <- "up.tsv"
annotation_file='data/metadata/direct-annotations__Homo_sapiens__Entrez.tsv'
```

```{r annotation}
GO_annotation = get_GO_annotation(here(annotation_file))
```

```{r microarray and RNAseq up pathways}
# get asinh matrix with all available pathways
marray_GO_mat_up = get_GO_asinh_matrix(marray_path_up, pattern, prefix_sub, suffix_sub)
rnaseq_GO_mat_up = get_GO_asinh_matrix(rnaseq_path_up, pattern, prefix_sub, suffix_sub)
```

```{r get statistically significant metrics -- positions for asterisk}
marray_qvalue_GO_mat_up = get_GO_qvalue_matrix(marray_path_up, pattern, prefix_sub, suffix_sub)
row.names(marray_qvalue_GO_mat_up) <- marray_qvalue_GO_mat_up$Description
marray_decription <- marray_qvalue_GO_mat_up$Description
marray_qvalue_GO_mat_up$Description <- NULL
marray_signi_GO_mat_up <- as.data.frame(ifelse(marray_qvalue_GO_mat_up < 0.05, 1, 0))
# exclude columns whose names contain "aggregated"
cols_to_use <- grep("aggregated", names(marray_signi_GO_mat_up), invert = TRUE)
# filter rows where the sum across the selected columns is > 0
marray_signi_up <- row.names(
  marray_signi_GO_mat_up[rowSums(marray_signi_GO_mat_up[, cols_to_use]) > 0, ]
)

rnaseq_qvalue_GO_mat_up = get_GO_qvalue_matrix(rnaseq_path_up, pattern, prefix_sub, suffix_sub)
row.names(rnaseq_qvalue_GO_mat_up) <- rnaseq_qvalue_GO_mat_up$Description
rnaseq_decription <- rnaseq_qvalue_GO_mat_up$Description
rnaseq_qvalue_GO_mat_up$Description <- NULL
rnaseq_signi_GO_mat_up <- as.data.frame(ifelse(rnaseq_qvalue_GO_mat_up < 0.05, 1, 0))
# exclude columns whose names contain "aggregated"
cols_to_use <- grep("aggregated", names(rnaseq_signi_GO_mat_up), invert = TRUE)
# filter rows where the sum across the selected columns is > 0
rnaseq_signi_up <- row.names(
  rnaseq_signi_GO_mat_up[rowSums(rnaseq_signi_GO_mat_up[, cols_to_use]) > 0, ]
)

marray_rnaseq_signi_up = unique(c(marray_signi_up, rnaseq_signi_up))
```

```{r process all terms matrices}
cols_to_keep_marray <- intersect(colnames(marray_GO_mat_up), c("Description", summary_df$SIGNATURE_NAME,
"up_aggregated_signature"))
df1 <- marray_GO_mat_up[, cols_to_keep_marray]
colnames(df1)[ncol(df1)] <- "up_aggregated_microarray"
colnames(df1) <- gsub("^up_", "", colnames(df1))

cols_to_keep_rnaseq <- intersect(colnames(rnaseq_GO_mat_up), c("Description", summary_df$SIGNATURE_NAME, "up_aggregated_signature"))
df2 <- rnaseq_GO_mat_up[, cols_to_keep_rnaseq]
colnames(df2)[ncol(df2)] <- "up_aggregated_RNAseq"
colnames(df2) <- gsub("^up_", "", colnames(df2))

# reshape from wide to long
long1 <- pivot_longer(df1, -Description, names_to = "Signature", values_to = "Value")
long2 <- pivot_longer(df2, -Description, names_to = "Signature", values_to = "Value")

# combine long formats and sum values where matching
combined_long <- bind_rows(long1, long2) %>%
  group_by(Description, Signature) %>%
  summarise(
  Value = if (all(is.na(Value))) NA_real_ else max(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
  .groups = "drop"
)

# reshape back to wide format
final_df_up <- pivot_wider(combined_long, names_from = Signature, values_from = Value)
colnames(final_df_up) <- gsub("\\.", "-", colnames(final_df_up))

# identify columns with "aggregated" in their names
agg_cols <- grep("aggregated", names(final_df_up), value = TRUE)

# identify columns that do not contain "aggregated"
non_agg_cols <- setdiff(names(final_df_up), agg_cols)

# reorder the dataframe
final_df_up <- final_df_up[, c(non_agg_cols, agg_cols)]

# identify columns
desc_col <- grep("Description", names(final_df_up), value = TRUE)
gpl_cols <- grep("GPL", names(final_df_up), value = TRUE)
rnaseq_col <- grep("RNAseq", names(final_df_up), value = TRUE)
other_cols <- setdiff(names(final_df_up), c(gpl_cols, rnaseq_col))

# reorder dataframe
final_df_up <- final_df_up[, c(desc_col, gpl_cols, other_cols, rnaseq_col)]
final_df_up <- final_df_up[, !duplicated(colnames(final_df_up))]
final_df_up <- final_df_up[, !grepl("HIV", colnames(final_df_up))]
write_tsv(final_df_up, here("figures/figure2/figure2a/marray_rnaseq_asinh_up_pathways.tsv"))
```

```{r process significant matrices}
marray_signi_GO_mat_up$Description <- row.names(marray_signi_GO_mat_up)
cols_to_keep_marray <- intersect(colnames(marray_signi_GO_mat_up), c("Description", summary_df$SIGNATURE_NAME, "up_aggregated_signature"))
df1 <- marray_signi_GO_mat_up[, cols_to_keep_marray]
colnames(df1)[ncol(df1)-1] <- "up_aggregated_microarray"
colnames(df1) <- gsub("^up_", "", colnames(df1))

rnaseq_signi_GO_mat_up$Description <- rownames(rnaseq_signi_GO_mat_up)
cols_to_keep_rnaseq <- intersect(colnames(rnaseq_signi_GO_mat_up), c("Description", summary_df$SIGNATURE_NAME, "up_aggregated_signature"))
df2 <- rnaseq_signi_GO_mat_up[, cols_to_keep_rnaseq]
colnames(df2)[ncol(df2)-1] <- "up_aggregated_RNAseq"
colnames(df2) <- gsub("^up_", "", colnames(df2))

# reshape from wide to long
long1 <- pivot_longer(as.data.frame(df1), -Description, names_to = "Signature", values_to = "Value")
long2 <- pivot_longer(as.data.frame(df2), -Description, names_to = "Signature", values_to = "Value")

# combine long formats and sum values where matching
combined_long <- bind_rows(long1, long2) %>%
  group_by(Description, Signature) %>%
  summarise(
  Value = if (all(is.na(Value))) NA_real_ else max(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
  .groups = "drop"
)

# reshape back to wide format
final_signi_df_up <- pivot_wider(combined_long, names_from = Signature, values_from = Value)
colnames(final_signi_df_up) <- gsub("\\.", "-", colnames(final_signi_df_up))

# identify columns with "aggregated" in their names
agg_cols <- grep("aggregated", names(final_signi_df_up), value = TRUE)

# identify columns that do not contain "aggregated"
non_agg_cols <- setdiff(names(final_signi_df_up), agg_cols)

# reorder the dataframe
final_signi_df_up <- final_signi_df_up[, c(non_agg_cols, agg_cols)]

# identify columns
desc_col <- grep("Description", names(final_signi_df_up), value = TRUE)
gpl_cols <- grep("GPL", names(final_signi_df_up), value = TRUE)
rnaseq_col <- grep("RNAseq", names(final_signi_df_up), value = TRUE)
other_cols <- setdiff(names(final_signi_df_up), c(gpl_cols, rnaseq_col))

# reorder dataframe
final_signi_df_up <- final_signi_df_up[, c(desc_col, gpl_cols, other_cols, rnaseq_col)]
final_signi_df_up <- final_signi_df_up[, !duplicated(colnames(final_signi_df_up))]
final_signi_df_up <- final_signi_df_up[, !grepl("HIV", colnames(final_signi_df_up))]
```

```{r define highly variable pathways}
final_df_up_indiv <- final_df_up[, !grepl("aggregated", colnames(final_df_up))] # get pathway matrix for only individual signatures
# only visualize terms at least significantly enriched in one signature
final_df_up_indiv <- final_df_up_indiv[final_df_up_indiv$Description %in% marray_rnaseq_signi_up,]

descriptions <- final_df_up_indiv$Description
numeric_mat <- as.matrix(
  final_df_up_indiv[ , sapply(final_df_up_indiv, is.numeric)]
)

# compute term variance (row variance)
final_df_up_variances <- apply(numeric_mat, MARGIN = 1, FUN = var, na.rm = TRUE)
# sort by variance
sorted_indices <- order(final_df_up_variances, decreasing = TRUE)
# combine them in to df
var_pathway_df <- data.frame(
  terms = descriptions[sorted_indices],
  variance = final_df_up_variances[sorted_indices]
)

variance_p90 = quantile(var_pathway_df$variance, probs = 0.90, na.rm = TRUE)
top_var_pathway_df = var_pathway_df[var_pathway_df$variance > variance_p90,]
```

```{r cluster the highly variable terms to reduce redundancy}
# cluster GO terms based on their semantic similarities
cl_GOids_terms = get_GOterms_cl(top_var_pathway_df)
write_tsv(cl_GOids_terms, here("figures/figure2/figure2a/up_hv_clusters_asinh_pathways.tsv"))
cl_GOids_terms <- read_tsv(here("figures/figure2/figure2a/up_hv_clusters_asinh_pathways.tsv"))
# select the term with highest variance from each defined cluster
top_terms_per_cluster <- get_topN_GOterms_cl(cl_GOids_terms, N = 1)

final_df_up_variable = final_df_up[final_df_up$Description %in% top_terms_per_cluster$terms,]
final_signi_df_up_variable = final_signi_df_up[final_signi_df_up$Description %in% top_terms_per_cluster$terms,]
write_tsv(final_df_up_variable, here("figures/figure2/figure2a/up_tophv_clusters_asinh_pathways.tsv"))
```

```{r convert GO matrix df to matrix format}
hv_GO_terms <- final_df_up_variable$Description
final_df_up_variable$Description <- NULL
sig_mat_indiv_aggr_up <- as.matrix(final_df_up_variable)
colnames(sig_mat_indiv_aggr_up) <- gsub("\\.", "-", colnames(sig_mat_indiv_aggr_up))
row.names(sig_mat_indiv_aggr_up) <- hv_GO_terms
```

```{r heatmap | order the GO terms by their semantic similarity}
# define vector of individual GO terms (character vector)
# must match rownames of your matrix exactly
go_terms <- rownames(sig_mat_indiv_aggr_up)

# compute semantic similarity matrix
hsGO <- godata('org.Hs.eg.db', ont = "BP")

n <- length(go_terms)
sim_matrix <- matrix(NA, n, n)
rownames(sim_matrix) <- colnames(sim_matrix) <- go_terms

for (i in seq_len(n)) {
  for (j in seq_len(n)) {
    sim_matrix[i, j] <- mgoSim(go_terms[i], go_terms[j], semData = hsGO, measure = "Wang", combine = "BMA")
  }
}

# hierarchical clustering and reordering
hc <- hclust(as.dist(1 - sim_matrix), method = "average")
ordered_go_terms <- hc$labels[hc$order]

# reorder matrix by GO semantic similarity
sig_mat_indiv_aggr_up_ordered <- sig_mat_indiv_aggr_up[ordered_go_terms, , drop = FALSE]
```

```{r define details for signature heatmap}
# define tissue short names
tissue_map <- c(
  "blood_PBMC"                         = "PBMC",
  "blood_PBMC_macrophage"             = "PBMC macrophage",
  "blood_monocyte"                     = "monocyte",
  "blood_monocyte_derived_macrophages" = "MDMs",
  "blood_dendritic_cells"              = "dendritic cells",
  "THP-1"                              = "THP1 macrophage",
  "blood_macrophage"                  = "macrophage",  
  "blood"                              = "blood",
  "lymphnode"                          = "lymphnode",
  "BAL_bronchoalveolar_lavage"         = "BAL",
  "HepG2"                        = "HepG2 epithelial",
  "blood_CD14plus_monocyte_derived_macrophages_MF1" = "CD14+ MDMs MF1",
  "blood_CD14plus_monocyte_derived_macrophages_MF2" = "CD14+ MDMs MF2"
)

# define tissue & technology colors
tissue_colors <- c(
  # blood-related (red/orange tones)
  "PBMC"                  = "#E41A1C",
  "MDMs"           = "#B22222",
  "monocyte"              = "#FF4500",
  "macrophage"            = "#FF6347",
  "CD14+ MDMs MF1"           = "#FF7F50",
  "CD14+ MDMs MF2"            = "#FF8C00",
  "dendritic cells"              = "#CD5C5C",
  "THP1 macrophage"            = "#FA8072",
  "blood"                 = "#DC143C",
  "PBMC macrophage" = "#800000",

  # lung-related (blue/green tones)
  "BAL"                   = "#41B6C4",

  # cell lines (grey/purple tones)
  "THP1 macrophage"            = "#7F7F7F",  # grey
  "HepG2 epithelial"           = "#BC80BD",  # muted purple

  # other tissues
  "lymphnode"             = "#FDB462"
)


tech_colors <- c(
  "RNAseq" = "#E69F00",
  "microarray" = "#56B4E9"
)

origin_colors <- c(
  "cell line" = "#D55E00",
  "primary" = "#009E73"
)

tb_colors <- c(
  "MTB" = "black",
  "PTB" = "#785EF0",
  "EPTB" = "#DC267F",
  "LNTB" = "#FE6100"
)

# prepare metadata/matrix
meta_df <- summary_df %>%
  mutate(
    tissue_short = recode(tissue_cell_type, !!!tissue_map)
  )

# ensure matrix is a data frame
sig_mat_indiv_aggr_up <- as.data.frame(sig_mat_indiv_aggr_up)
aggregated_pathways <- sig_mat_indiv_aggr_up[c("aggregated_microarray","aggregated_RNAseq")]

# reorder columns according to metadata
sig_mat_indiv_up_ordered <- sig_mat_indiv_aggr_up[, head(meta_df$SIGNATURE_NAME, -2), drop = FALSE]
sig_mat_indiv_aggr_up_ordered <- cbind(
  sig_mat_indiv_up_ordered,
  aggregated_pathways[rownames(sig_mat_indiv_up_ordered), , drop = FALSE]
)

# set color range 
actual_range <- range(as.numeric(unlist(sig_mat_indiv_aggr_up_ordered)), na.rm = TRUE)
ninetyfifth_percentile <- quantile(actual_range, 0.95)
fifty_percentile <- quantile(actual_range, 0.50)
fifty_percentile <- quantile(actual_range, 0.50)
fifth_percentile <- quantile(actual_range, 0.05)

col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  c(0, fifth_percentile, fifty_percentile, ninetyfifth_percentile),
  c("white", "skyblue", "dodgerblue", "dodgerblue4")
)

# create top and bottom annotations
ha_top <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  technology = meta_df$technology,
  col = list(technology = tech_colors),
  annotation_name_side = "left",
  annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 25),
  annotation_legend_param = list(
    technology = list(
      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 25),
      labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 25)
    )
  )
)

ha_bottom <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  tissue_cell = meta_df$tissue_short,
  origin_type = meta_df$sample_origin,
  TB_type = meta_df$tb_status,
  col = list(
    tissue_cell = tissue_colors,
    origin_type = origin_colors,
    TB_type = tb_colors
  ),
  annotation_name_side = "left",
  annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize = 25),
  annotation_legend_param = list(
    tissue_cell = list(
      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 25),
      labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 25)
    ),
    origin_type = list(
      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 25),
      labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 25)
    ),
    TB_type = list(
      title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 25),
      labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 25)
    )
  )
)
```

```{r plot heatmap and save}
pdf(here("figures/figure2/figure2a/Figure2a_up_clustered_hvariance_asinh_GOterms_enrichment.pdf"), width = 60, height = 30)

sig_mat_indiv_aggr_up_ordered_mat <- sig_mat_indiv_aggr_up_ordered %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)) %>%
  as.matrix()

viz_mat_up <- sig_mat_indiv_aggr_up_ordered_mat
colnames(viz_mat_up) <- summary_df$dataset_signature_ID


heatmap_sig_up_go <- Heatmap( ## add astrisk: final_signi_df_up_variable
  viz_mat_up,
  cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, w, h, fill) {
                # j: column index, i: row index
                # x, y: coordinates of the cell center
                # w, h: width and height of the cell
                # fill: fill color of the cell (not directly used here, but available)

                # check if the current cell (i, j) is "significant" in your position matrix
                if (final_signi_df_up_variable[i, j] == 1) {
                  # add an asterisk to the center of the cell
                  grid.text("*", x, y, gp = gpar(col = "black", fontsize = 30))
                }
              },
  name = "GO term enrichment",
  na_col = "lightgrey",
  col = col_fun,
  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title = "asinh(observed/expected)",
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 25),
    labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 25)
  ),
  column_title = "Individual upregulated \n microarray & RNASeq TB signatures",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 25),
  row_title = "Enriched GO biological processes",
  row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 25),
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "grey"),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  row_order = rownames(viz_mat_up),
  column_names_rot = 60,
  top_annotation = ha_top,
  bottom_annotation = ha_bottom,
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 25),
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 25),
  width = unit(55, "cm"),
  height = unit(25, "cm")
)

draw(heatmap_sig_up_go,
     heatmap_legend_side = "left", 
     annotation_legend_side = "left")

dev.off()

```
